amount.business_reasoning: Median purchase amount is representative of a typical transaction and is less affected by outliers.
amount.risk_assessment: Low risk because median is robust to extreme values.

email.business_reasoning: Email is required for customer communication and marketing campaigns.
email.risk_assessment: Low risk because only a few rows are removed.

name.business_reasoning: Most frequent customer name preserves the categorical distribution.
name.risk_assessment: Low risk because only one value is missing.
